title: Tripple D Pack
description: A Modpack which adds some QoL mods, upgrades the world generation and adds mods for food and factories.
body:
The Modpack adds some QoL mods such as:
  - Sodium and Iris Shader
  - REI and Jade
  - Litematic and Visual Workbench
  - and some more...

For the world generation Biomes o Plenty and Tectonic are included.

For people who like more food in minecraft Farmers Delight with two addons is included. And for the good old technicians there is Energized Power included.
